zones.name: Silk Board Junction
zones.description: Major interchange connecting ORR, Hosur Road, and BTM Layout. India's most infamous traffic junction.

zones.name: Hebbal Flyover
zones.description: North Bengaluru bottleneck connecting NH44 to the city. Chronic congestion during peak hours.

zones.name: Whitefield
zones.description: Major IT corridor with ITPL and numerous tech parks. Peak-hour overload from office commuters.

zones.name: Electronic City
zones.description: Southern tech hub housing Infosys, Wipro, and TCS campuses. Elevated expressway helps but entry/exit points congest.

zones.name: KR Puram
zones.description: Railway junction and industrial area. Heavy vehicle traffic and pollution from Old Madras Road corridor.

zones.name: Peenya Industrial Area
zones.description: Bengaluru's largest industrial belt. High pollution from manufacturing units. Heavy goods vehicle traffic.

zones.name: Majestic / Kempegowda
zones.description: Central bus terminal and metro interchange. Highest footfall transit hub in Bengaluru.

zones.name: Koramangala
zones.description: Startup hub with dense commercial and residential mix. Weekend nightlife causes congestion spikes.

zones.name: Indiranagar
zones.description: Upscale commercial district. 100 Feet Road and 12th Main are perennially congested. Nightlife hotspot.

zones.name: MG Road / Brigade Road
zones.description: Central business district and shopping area. Event-heavy zone near Chinnaswamy Stadium.

zones.name: Bannerghatta Road
zones.description: Single arterial road with no viable alternatives. Connects southern residential areas to the city center.

zones.name: Marathahalli / ORR
zones.description: Outer Ring Road's worst stretch. Confluence of IT traffic, residential areas, and the ORR flyover.

zones.name: Yelahanka
zones.description: Emerging residential area near Air Force Station. Rapid growth causing infrastructure strain.

zones.name: Jayanagar
zones.description: Well-planned residential area with school-zone traffic. 4th Block commercial area sees weekend rush.

zones.name: Bellandur
zones.description: IT corridor adjacent to the infamous Bellandur Lake. Flooding risk combined with ORR traffic bottleneck.

zones.name: Yeshwanthpur
zones.description: Railway junction with industrial and wholesale market areas. APMC yard causes heavy goods vehicle traffic.
